description: A Phoenix LiveView Button Group component.
docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ButtonGroup

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.ButtonGroup do use Phoenix.Component attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global slot :inner_block, required: true def button_group(assigns) do ~H"""
*:not(:first-child)]:-ml-px [&>*:not(:first-child)]:rounded-l-none [&>*:not(:last-child)]:rounded-r-none [&>button]:shadow-none", @class ]} {@rest} > {render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end end

name: button-group
title: Button Group
